title: Nuance and Confusable Words
description: Achieve near-native precision by mastering the pairs and collocations that confuse even advanced learners: affect/effect, imply/infer, comprise/compose, sensible/sensitive, and many more — plus the art of connotation and collocation.
sources: CEFR C2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Oxford Collocations Dictionary for Students of English (Oxford University Press)
